30	    .backgroundColor(Theme.pageBg)
31	    .scrollBar(BarState.Off)
32	  }
33	
34	  @Builder
35	  Header(issue: Issue | null) {
36	    Row() {
37	      Button('返回')
38	        .fontSize(13)
39	        .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
40	        .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
41	        .onClick(() => this.onBack())
42	      Text(issue?.title ?? '隐患详情')
43	        .id(Ids.issueDetailTitle)
44	        .fontSize(18)
45	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
46	        .fontColor(Theme.brandDeep)
47	        .maxLines(1)
48	        .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
49	      Button('编辑')
50	        .id(Ids.issueDetailEditButton)
51	        .fontSize(13)
52	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
53	        .fontColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
54	        .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
55	        .onClick(() => this.onEdit(this.issueId))
56	    }
57	    .width('100%')
58	    .height(56)
59	    .justifyContent(FlexAlign.SpaceBetween)
60	    .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
61	  }
62	
63	  @Builder
64	  DetailCard(issue: Issue) {
65	    Column({ space: 10 }) {
66	      Row({ space: 8 }) {
67	        Text(statusLabel(issue.status))
68	          .id(Ids.issueDetailStatusBadge)
69	          .fontSize(11)
70	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
71	          .fontColor(this.statusColor(issue.status))
72	          .padding({ left: 10, right: 10, top: 4, bottom: 4 })
73	          .borderRadius(9999)
74	          .backgroundColor(this.statusBg(issue.status))
75	        Text(riskLabel(issue.riskLevel))
76	          .id(Ids.issueDetailRiskBadge)
77	          .fontSize(11)
78	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
79	          .fontColor(this.riskColor(issue.riskLevel))
80	          .padding({ left: 10, right: 10, top: 4, bottom: 4 })
81	          .borderRadius(9999)
82	          .backgroundColor(this.riskBg(issue.riskLevel))
83	      }
84	      .width('100%')
85	
86	      this.InfoRow('位置', issue.location, Ids.issueDetailLocation)
87	      this.InfoRow('负责人', issue.assignee, Ids.issueDetailAssignee)
88	      this.InfoRow('截止日期', formatDateTime(issue.dueDate), Ids.issueDetailDueDate)
89	
90	      Text(issue.description)
91	        .id(Ids.issueDetailDescription)
92	        .fontSize(14)
93	        .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
94	        .width('100%')
95	
96	      if (issue.photos.length > 0) {
97	        Row({ space: 8 }) {
98	          ForEach(issue.photos, (uri: string, index: number) => {
99	            Image(uri)
100	              .id(`issue-detail-photo-${index}`)
101	              .width(80)
102	              .height(80)
103	              .borderRadius(12)
104	              .objectFit(ImageFit.Cover)
105	          }, (uri: string, index: number) => `${uri}-${index}`)
106	        }
107	        .id(Ids.issueDetailPhotoList)
108	        .width('100%')
109	      }
110	    }
111	    .width('100%')
112	    .padding(16)
113	    .borderRadius(16)
114	    .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
115	    .shadow({ radius: 8, color: 'rgba(13,148,136,0.10)', offsetY: 3 })
116	  }
117	
118	  @Builder
119	  InfoRow(label: string, value: string, targetId: string) {
120	    Row() {
121	      Text(`${label}：`)
122	        .fontSize(13)
123	        .fontColor(Theme.textTertiary)
124	      Text(value)
125	        .id(targetId)
126	        .fontSize(14)
127	        .fontColor(Theme.textPrimary)
128	        .layoutWeight(1)
129	    }
130	    .width('100%')
131	  }
132	
133	  @Builder
134	  Timeline(issue: Issue) {
135	    Column({ space: 8 }) {
136	      Text('整改进度')
137	        .fontSize(15)
138	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
139	        .fontColor(Theme.textPrimary)
140	        .width('100%')
141	      Column({ space: 10 }) {
142	        ForEach(issue.timeline, (event: TimelineEvent, index: number) => {
143	          Row({ space: 10 }) {
144	            Column()
145	              .width(10)
146	              .height(10)
147	              .borderRadius(5)
148	              .backgroundColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
149	            Column({ space: 2 }) {
150	              Text(statusLabel(event.status))
151	                .fontSize(13)
152	                .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
153	                .fontColor(Theme.textPrimary)
154	              Text(`${event.note} · ${formatDateTime(event.timestamp)}`)
155	                .fontSize(11)
156	                .fontColor(Theme.textTertiary)
157	            }
158	            .layoutWeight(1)
159	            .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
160	          }
161	          .id(`issue-detail-timeline-${index}`)
162	          .width('100%')
163	        }, (event: TimelineEvent, index: number) => `${event.id}-${index}`)
164	      }
165	      .id(Ids.issueDetailTimelineList)
166	      .width('100%')
167	    }
168	    .width('100%')
169	    .padding(16)
170	    .borderRadius(16)
171	    .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
172	    .shadow({ radius: 8, color: 'rgba(13,148,136,0.10)', offsetY: 3 })
173	  }
174	
175	  @Builder
176	  Actions(issue: Issue) {
177	    Row({ space: 10 }) {
178	      if (issue.status !== 'completed' && issue.status !== 'closed') {
179	        Button('更新进度')
180	          .id(Ids.issueDetailProgressActionButton)
181	          .fontSize(14)
182	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
183	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
184	          .layoutWeight(1)
185	          .height(46)
186	          .borderRadius(23)
187	          .backgroundColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
188	          .onClick(() => this.state.advanceIssue(this.issueId))
189	      }
190	      Button('关闭')
191	        .id(Ids.issueDetailCloseButton)
192	        .fontSize(14)
193	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
194	        .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
195	        .layoutWeight(1)
196	        .height(46)
197	        .borderRadius(23)
198	        .backgroundColor(Theme.textTertiary)
199	        .onClick(() => {
200	          this.state.closeIssue(this.issueId)
201	          this.onBack()
202	        })
203	    }
204	    .width('100%')
205	  }
206	
207	  private statusColor(status: string): string {
208	    if (status === 'completed' || status === 'closed') {
209	      return Theme.safe
210	    } else if (status === 'processing') {
211	      return Theme.warning
212	    } else if (status === 'awaiting-review') {
213	      return Theme.info
214	    }
215	    return Theme.danger
216	  }
217	
218	  private statusBg(status: string): string {
219	    if (status === 'completed' || status === 'closed') {
220	      return Theme.safeBg
221	    } else if (status === 'processing') {
222	      return Theme.warningBg
223	    } else if (status === 'awaiting-review') {
224	      return Theme.infoBg
225	    }
226	    return Theme.dangerBg
227	  }
228	
229	  private riskColor(level: string): string {
230	    if (level === 'low') {
231	      return Theme.safe
232	    } else if (level === 'medium') {
233	      return Theme.warning
234	    } else if (level === 'high') {
235	      return Theme.danger
236	    }
237	    return Theme.critical
238	  }
239	
240	  private riskBg(level: string): string {
241	    if (level === 'low') {
242	      return Theme.safeBg
243	    } else if (level === 'medium') {
244	      return Theme.warningBg
245	    } else if (level === 'high') {
246	      return Theme.dangerBg
247	    }
248	    return Theme.criticalBg
249	  }
250	}

1	import { SafetyAppState } from '../viewmodels/SafetyAppState'
2	import { Ids } from '../common/Ids'
3	import { Theme } from '../common/Theme'
4	import { ContactGroup } from '../models/SafetyTypes'
5	
6	@Component
7	export struct ContactFormPage {
8	  @ObjectLink state: SafetyAppState
9	  mode: 'create' | 'edit' = 'create'
10	  onBack: () => void = () => {}
11	
12	  build() {
13	    Column({ space: 0 }) {
14	      this.Header()
15	      Scroll() {
16	        Column({ space: 14 }) {
17	          this.TextField('姓名', this.state.contactForm.name, Ids.contactFormNameInput, (v: string) => this.state.contactForm.name = v)
18	          this.TextField('职务', this.state.contactForm.role, Ids.contactFormRoleInput, (v: string) => this.state.contactForm.role = v)
19	          this.PickerRow('分组', Ids.contactFormGroupPicker, ['消防', '安保', '医疗', '主管', '其他'], this.groupIndex(), (i: number) => {
20	            let map: ContactGroup[] = [ContactGroup.FIRE, ContactGroup.SECURITY, ContactGroup.MEDICAL, ContactGroup.MANAGER, ContactGroup.OTHER]
21	            this.state.contactForm.group = map[i] ?? ContactGroup.OTHER
22	          })
23	          this.TextField('电话', this.state.contactForm.phone, Ids.contactFormPhoneInput, (v: string) => this.state.contactForm.phone = v)
24	          Row() {
25	            Text('优先显示')
26	              .fontSize(14)
27	              .fontColor(Theme.textPrimary)
28	            Toggle({ type: ToggleType.Switch, isOn: this.state.contactForm.priority })
29	              .id(Ids.contactFormPriorityToggle)
30	              .selectedColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
31	              .onChange((v: boolean) => this.state.contactForm.priority = v)
32	          }
33	          .width('100%')
34	          .height(48)
35	          .justifyContent(FlexAlign.SpaceBetween)
36	
37	          this.Actions()
38	        }
39	        .width('100%')
40	        .padding({ left: Theme.pageHorizontalPadding, right: Theme.pageHorizontalPadding, top: 16, bottom: 24 })
41	      }
42	      .width('100%')
43	      .layoutWeight(1)
44	    }
45	    .width('100%')
46	    .height('100%')
47	    .backgroundColor(Theme.pageBg)
48	  }
49	
50	  @Builder
51	  Header() {
52	    Row() {
53	      Button('返回')
54	        .id(Ids.contactFormCancelButton)
55	        .fontSize(13)
56	        .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
57	        .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
58	        .onClick(() => this.onBack())
59	      Text(this.mode === 'create' ? '新增联系人' : '编辑联系人')
60	        .fontSize(18)
61	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
62	        .fontColor(Theme.brandDeep)
63	      Button('保存')
64	        .id(Ids.contactFormSaveButton)
65	        .fontSize(13)
66	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
67	        .fontColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
68	        .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
69	        .onClick(() => this.save())
70	    }
71	    .width('100%')
72	    .height(56)
73	    .padding({ left: Theme.pageHorizontalPadding, right: Theme.pageHorizontalPadding })
74	    .justifyContent(FlexAlign.SpaceBetween)
75	    .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
76	  }
77	
78	  @Builder
79	  TextField(label: string, value: string, targetId: string, onChange: (v: string) => void) {
80	    Column({ space: 6 }) {
81	      Text(label)
82	        .fontSize(13)
83	        .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
84	        .width('100%')
85	      TextInput({ text: value })
86	        .id(targetId)
87	        .width('100%')
88	        .height(44)
89	        .borderRadius(12)
90	        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
91	        .onChange(onChange)
92	    }
93	    .width('100%')
94	  }
95	
96	  @Builder
97	  PickerRow(label: string, targetId: string, options: string[], selected: number, onSelect: (i: number) => void) {
98	    Column({ space: 6 }) {
99	      Text(label)
100	        .fontSize(13)
101	        .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
102	        .width('100%')
103	      Select(options.map((o: string) => ({ value: o })))
104	        .id(targetId)
105	        .selected(selected)
106	        .value(options[selected])
107	        .width('100%')
108	        .height(44)
109	        .borderRadius(12)
110	        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
111	        .onSelect((index: number) => onSelect(index))
112	    }
113	    .width('100%')
114	  }
115	
116	  @Builder
117	  Actions() {
118	    Row({ space: 10 }) {
119	      Button('取消')
120	        .id(Ids.contactFormCancelButton)
121	        .fontSize(14)
122	        .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
123	        .layoutWeight(1)
124	        .height(46)
125	        .borderRadius(23)
126	        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
127	        .onClick(() => this.onBack())
128	      Button('保存')
129	        .id(Ids.contactFormSaveButton)
130	        .fontSize(14)
131	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
132	        .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
133	        .layoutWeight(1)
134	        .height(46)
135	        .borderRadius(23)
136	        .backgroundColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
137	        .onClick(() => this.save())
138	    }
139	    .width('100%')
140	    .margin({ top: 8 })
141	  }
142	
143	  private groupIndex(): number {
144	    let map: ContactGroup[] = [ContactGroup.FIRE, ContactGroup.SECURITY, ContactGroup.MEDICAL, ContactGroup.MANAGER, ContactGroup.OTHER]
145	    return map.indexOf(this.state.contactForm.group)
146	  }
147	
148	  private save(): void {
149	    if (this.state.submitContactForm()) {
150	      this.onBack()
151	    }
152	  }
153	}

1	import { SafetyAppState } from '../../viewmodels/SafetyAppState'
2	import { Ids } from '../../common/Ids'
3	import { Theme } from '../../common/Theme'
4	
5	@Component
6	export struct PatrolCheckinSheet {
7	  @ObjectLink state: SafetyAppState
8	  onCancel: () => void = () => {}
9	  onReport: (pointId: string) => void = () => {}
10	
11	  build() {
12	    Column({ space: 14 }) {
13	      Text('巡检打卡')
14	        .fontSize(18)
15	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
16	        .fontColor(Theme.brandDeep)
17	        .width('100%')
18	
19	      TextArea({ text: this.state.patrolCheckin.notes, placeholder: '记录现场情况' })
20	        .id(Ids.patrolCheckinNotesInput)
21	        .width('100%')
22	        .height(100)
23	        .borderRadius(12)
24	        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
25	        .onChange((v: string) => this.state.patrolCheckin.notes = v)
26	
27	      Row() {
28	        Text('发现异常')
29	          .fontSize(14)
30	          .fontColor(Theme.textPrimary)
31	        Toggle({ type: ToggleType.Switch, isOn: this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal })
32	          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinAbnormalToggle)
33	          .selectedColor(Theme.danger)
34	          .onChange((v: boolean) => this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal = v)
35	      }
36	      .width('100%')
37	      .height(48)
38	      .justifyContent(FlexAlign.SpaceBetween)
39	
40	      Button('拍照')
41	        .id(Ids.patrolCheckinPhotoButton)
42	        .fontSize(13)
43	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
44	        .fontColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
45	        .width('100%')
46	        .height(40)
47	        .borderRadius(12)
48	        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
49	        .onClick(() => this.state.capturePhotoForCheckin())
50	
51	      if (this.state.patrolCheckin.photos.length > 0) {
52	        Row({ space: 8 }) {
53	          ForEach(this.state.patrolCheckin.photos, (uri: string, index: number) => {
54	            Image(uri)
55	              .width(64)
56	              .height(64)
57	              .borderRadius(12)
58	              .objectFit(ImageFit.Cover)
59	          }, (uri: string, index: number) => `${uri}-${index}`)
60	        }
61	        .width('100%')
62	      }
63	
64	      Row({ space: 10 }) {
65	        Button('取消')
66	          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinCancelButton)
67	          .fontSize(14)
68	          .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
69	          .layoutWeight(1)
70	          .height(46)
71	          .borderRadius(23)
72	          .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
73	          .onClick(() => this.onCancel())
74	        Button('提交')
75	          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinSubmitButton)
76	          .fontSize(14)
77	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
78	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
79	          .layoutWeight(1)
80	          .height(46)
81	          .borderRadius(23)
82	          .backgroundColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
83	          .onClick(() => this.submit())
84	      }
85	      .width('100%')
86	    }
87	    .id(Ids.patrolCheckinModal)
88	    .width('100%')
89	    .padding(20)
90	    .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
91	    .borderRadius({ topLeft: 20, topRight: 20 })
92	  }
93	
94	  private submit(): void {
95	    this.state.submitPatrolCheckin()
96	    if (this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal) {
97	      this.onReport(this.state.patrolCheckin.pointId)
98	    }
99	    this.onCancel()
100	  }
101	}

import { SafetyAppState } from '../../viewmodels/SafetyAppState'
import { Ids } from '../../common/Ids'
import { Theme } from '../../common/Theme'

@Component
export struct PatrolCheckinSheet {
  @ObjectLink state: SafetyAppState
  onCancel: () => void = () => {}
  onReport: (pointId: string) => void = () => {}

  build() {
    Column({ space: 14 }) {
      Text('巡检打卡')
        .fontSize(18)
        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
        .fontColor(Theme.brandDeep)
        .width('100%')

      TextArea({ text: this.state.patrolCheckin.notes, placeholder: '记录现场情况' })
        .id(Ids.patrolCheckinNotesInput)
        .width('100%')
        .height(100)
        .borderRadius(12)
        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
        .onChange((v: string) => this.state.patrolCheckin.notes = v)

      Row() {
        Text('发现异常')
          .fontSize(14)
          .fontColor(Theme.textPrimary)
        Toggle({ type: ToggleType.Switch, isOn: this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal })
          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinAbnormalToggle)
          .selectedColor(Theme.danger)
          .onChange((v: boolean) => this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal = v)
      }
      .width('100%')
      .height(48)
      .justifyContent(FlexAlign.SpaceBetween)

      Button('拍照')
        .id(Ids.patrolCheckinPhotoButton)
        .fontSize(13)
        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
        .fontColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
        .width('100%')
        .height(40)
        .borderRadius(12)
        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
        .onClick(() => this.state.capturePhotoForCheckin())

      if (this.state.patrolCheckin.photos.length > 0) {
        Row({ space: 8 }) {
          ForEach(this.state.patrolCheckin.photos, (uri: string, index: number) => {
            Image(uri)
              .width(64)
              .height(64)
              .borderRadius(12)
              .objectFit(ImageFit.Cover)
          }, (uri: string, index: number) => `${uri}-${index}`)
        }
        .width('100%')
      }

      Row({ space: 10 }) {
        Button('取消')
          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinCancelButton)
          .fontSize(14)
          .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
          .layoutWeight(1)
          .height(46)
          .borderRadius(23)
          .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
          .onClick(() => this.onCancel())
        Button('提交')
          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinSubmitButton)
          .fontSize(14)
          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
          .layoutWeight(1)
          .height(46)
          .borderRadius(23)
          .backgroundColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
          .onClick(() => this.submit())
      }
      .width('100%')
    }
    .id(Ids.patrolCheckinModal)
    .width('100%')
    .padding(20)
    .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
    .borderRadius({ topLeft: 20, topRight: 20 })
  }

  private submit(): void {
    this.state.submitPatrolCheckin()
    if (this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal) {
      this.onReport(this.state.patrolCheckin.pointId)
    }
    this.onCancel()
  }
}

import { SafetyAppState } from '../../viewmodels/SafetyAppState'
import { Ids } from '../../common/Ids'
import { Theme } from '../../common/Theme'

@Component
export struct PatrolCheckinSheet {
  @ObjectLink state: SafetyAppState
  onCancel: () => void = () => {}
  onReport: (pointId: string) => void = () => {}

  build() {
    Column({ space: 14 }) {
      Text('巡检打卡')
        .fontSize(18)
        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
        .fontColor(Theme.brandDeep)
        .width('100%')

      TextArea({ text: this.state.patrolCheckin.notes, placeholder: '记录现场情况' })
        .id(Ids.patrolCheckinNotesInput)
        .width('100%')
        .height(100)
        .borderRadius(12)
        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
        .onChange((v: string) => this.state.patrolCheckin.notes = v)

      Row() {
        Text('发现异常')
          .fontSize(14)
          .fontColor(Theme.textPrimary)
        Toggle({ type: ToggleType.Switch, isOn: this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal })
          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinAbnormalToggle)
          .selectedColor(Theme.danger)
          .onChange((v: boolean) => this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal = v)
      }
      .width('100%')
      .height(48)
      .justifyContent(FlexAlign.SpaceBetween)

      Button('拍照')
        .id(Ids.patrolCheckinPhotoButton)
        .fontSize(13)
        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
        .fontColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
        .width('100%')
        .height(40)
        .borderRadius(12)
        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
        .onClick(() => this.state.capturePhotoForCheckin())

      if (this.state.patrolCheckin.photos.length > 0) {
        Row({ space: 8 }) {
          ForEach(this.state.patrolCheckin.photos, (uri: string, index: number) => {
            Image(uri)
              .width(64)
              .height(64)
              .borderRadius(12)
              .objectFit(ImageFit.Cover)
          }, (uri: string, index: number) => `${uri}-${index}`)
        }
        .width('100%')
      }

      Row({ space: 10 }) {
        Button('取消')
          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinCancelButton)
          .fontSize(14)
          .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
          .layoutWeight(1)
          .height(46)
          .borderRadius(23)
          .backgroundColor(Theme.surfaceSecondary)
          .onClick(() => this.onCancel())
        Button('提交')
          .id(Ids.patrolCheckinSubmitButton)
          .fontSize(14)
          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
          .layoutWeight(1)
          .height(46)
          .borderRadius(23)
          .backgroundColor(Theme.brandPrimary)
          .onClick(() => this.submit())
      }
      .width('100%')
    }
    .id(Ids.patrolCheckinModal)
    .width('100%')
    .padding(20)
    .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
    .borderRadius({ topLeft: 20, topRight: 20 })
  }

  private submit(): void {
    this.state.submitPatrolCheckin()
    if (this.state.patrolCheckin.isAbnormal) {
      this.onReport(this.state.patrolCheckin.pointId)
    }
    this.onCancel()
  }
}

146	  private groupedContacts(): GroupedContacts[] {
147	    let map: Map<ContactGroup, Contact[]> = new Map()
148	    this.state.contacts.forEach((c: Contact) => {

150	      list.push(c)
151	      map.set(c.group, list)
152	    })
153	    let result: GroupedContacts[] = []
154	    map.forEach((contacts: Contact[], group: ContactGroup) => {
155	      result.push({ group, contacts })
156	    })
157	    return result
158	  }

@Builder
  PickerRow(label: string, targetId: string, options: string[], selected: number, onSelect: (i: number) => void) {
    Column({ space: 6 }) {
      Text(label)
        .fontSize(13)
        .fontColor(Theme.textSecondary)
        .width('100%')
      Select(options.map((o: string) => ({ value: o })))
        .id(targetId)
        .selected(selected)
        .value(options[selected])
        .width('100%')
        .height(44)
        .borderRadius(12)
        .backgroundColor(Theme.surfacePrimary)
        .onSelect((index: number) => onSelect(index))
    }
    .width('100%')
  }

file.content:
item.status = Object.values(IssueStatus).includes(String(r['status']) as IssueStatus) ? String(r['status']) as IssueStatus : IssueStatus.PENDING
  item.reporterId = String(r['reporterId'] ?? '')
  item.assignee = String(r['assignee'] ?? '')
  item.location = String(r['location'] ?? '')
  item.photos = Array.isArray(r['photos']) ? (r['photos'] as object[]).map((p: object) => String(p)) : []
  item.description = String(r['description'] ?? '')
  item.createdAt = Number(r['createdAt'] ?? 0)
  item.dueDate = Number(r['dueDate'] ?? 0)
  item.updatedAt = Number(r['updatedAt'] ?? 0)
  item.timeline = Array.isArray(r['timeline']) ? (r['timeline'] as object[]).map(toTimelineEvent) : []
  return item
}

function toTimelineEvent(raw: object): import('../models/SafetyTypes').TimelineEvent {
  let r = raw as Record<string, object>
  let item: import('../models/SafetyTypes').TimelineEvent = new (import('../models/SafetyTypes').TimelineEvent)()
  item.id = String(r['id'] ?? '')
  item.issueId = String(r['issueId'] ?? '')
  item.timestamp = Number(r['timestamp'] ?? 0)
  item.status = Object.values(IssueStatus).includes(String(r['status']) as IssueStatus) ? String(r['status']) as IssueStatus : IssueStatus.PENDING
  item.note = String(r['note'] ?? '')
  item.actorId = String(r['actorId'] ?? '')
  return item
}

111	  // Patrol
112	  listPatrolPoints(): PatrolPoint[] {
113	    let points: PatrolPoint[] = this.store.getPatrolPoints()
114	    if (points.length === 0) {
115	      points = defaultPatrolPoints()
116	      this.store.savePatrolPoints(points)
117	    }
118	    return points.slice().sort((a: PatrolPoint, b: PatrolPoint) => a.sequence - b.sequence)
119	  }
120	
121	  getPatrolPoint(id: string): PatrolPoint | null {
122	    return this.listPatrolPoints().find((p: PatrolPoint) => p.id === id) ?? null
123	  }
124	
125	  checkinPatrolPoint(draft: PatrolCheckinDraft, actorId: string = ''): { point: PatrolPoint, record: PatrolRecord, issue?: Issue } {
126	    let points: PatrolPoint[] = this.listPatrolPoints()
127	    let point: PatrolPoint | undefined = points.find((p: PatrolPoint) => p.id === draft.pointId)
128	    if (!point) {
129	      throw new Error('Patrol point not found')
130	    }
131	    let now: number = Date.now()
132	    point.status = draft.isAbnormal ? PatrolPointStatus.ABNORMAL : PatrolPointStatus.DONE
133	    point.lastCheckAt = now
134	    this.store.savePatrolPoints(points)
135	
136	    let record: PatrolRecord = new PatrolRecord()
137	    record.id = uuid()
138	    record.pointId = draft.pointId
139	    record.checkedAt = now
140	    record.photos = draft.photos.slice()
141	    record.notes = draft.notes.trim()
142	    record.abnormal = draft.isAbnormal
143	    record.relatedIssueId = null
144	
145	    let records: PatrolRecord[] = this.store.getPatrolRecords()
146	    records.unshift(record)
147	    this.store.savePatrolRecords(records)
148	
149	    let issue: Issue | undefined = undefined
150	    if (draft.isAbnormal) {
151	      issue = this.createIssue({
152	        title: `${point.name} 巡检异常`,
153	        type: IssueType.HAZARD,
154	        riskLevel: RiskLevel.MEDIUM,
155	        location: point.area,
156	        assignee: '',
157	        dueDate: now + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
158	        description: record.notes,
159	        photos: record.photos.slice(),
160	        linkedPointId: point.id
161	      } as IssueFormDraft, actorId)
162	      record.relatedIssueId = issue.id
163	      let updatedRecords: PatrolRecord[] = this.store.getPatrolRecords()
164	      let ridx: number = updatedRecords.findIndex((r: PatrolRecord) => r.id === record.id)
165	      if (ridx >= 0) {
166	        updatedRecords[ridx] = record
167	        this.store.savePatrolRecords(updatedRecords)
168	      }
169	    }
170	
171	    return { point, record, issue }
172	  }

content.text:
Build passed. Implementation is functionally complete with the scaffold shell preserved, blue-green safety theme applied, all five tab surfaces, issue CRUD, patrol checkin, contacts, and stats implemented.

**Handoff Summary**

- Behavior contract: `.arkpilot/designs/ui-behavior.json` created from `spec.md` + `ui-tree.json`.
- Scaffold shell preserved: `Theme.ets`, `SvgIcon.ets`, `TabTypes.ets`, `BottomTabBar.ets`, `Index.ets` kept as shared contracts; tabs updated to home/patrol/issues/contacts/stats.
- Visual integration: consumed `page-home.html` as the visual contract for the blue-green safety palette, KPI grid, quick actions, recent issues list, and tab bar styling.
- Source files added/changed:
  - `entry/src/main/ets/models/SafetyTypes.ets`
  - `entry/src/main/ets/services/SafetyStore.ets`, `SafetyService.ets`, `PhotoService.ets`, `CallService.ets`, `NotificationService.ets`
  - `entry/src/main/ets/viewmodels/SafetyAppState.ets`
  - `entry/src/main/ets/common/Theme.ets`, `SvgIcon.ets`, `TabTypes.ets`, `Ids.ets`, `Formatters.ets`, `Uuid.ets`
  - `entry/src/main/ets/pages/Index.ets`, `HomePage.ets`, `PatrolPage.ets`, `IssuesPage.ets`, `ContactsPage.ets`, `StatsPage.ets`, `IssueFormPage.ets`, `IssueDetailPage.ets`, `ContactFormPage.ets`
  - `entry/src/main/ets/components/BottomTabBar.ets`
  - `entry/src/main/ets/components/sheets/PatrolCheckinSheet.ets`
  - `entry/src/main/ets/entryability/EntryAbility.ets`
- Build evidence: `:entry:assembleHap` debug build succeeded (no ArkTS errors; warnings are stub-service toast deprecations and `Object.values` usage in SafetyStore, non-blocking).
- Remaining risks/notes:
  - Photo capture, phone call, and notifications are stubs; real behavior requires camera/telephony/notification permissions and platform APIs.
  - Only `page-home.html` visual artifact was present; other screens were implemented from the semantic UI protocol and behavior contract rather than page-specific HTML.
  - `SvgIcon.ets` uses text fallbacks because no prepared rawfile SVG assets were provided; replace with actual SVG mappings when assets arrive.
